scoring_contract.option_points: integer, 0 = captured behavior, max = sovereign behavior
scoring_contract.total_score: weighted average of dimension scores per score_dimensions.json

questions.text: What share of your revenue flows through your single largest platform or marketplace?
If your largest channel suspended your account today, how long could you keep selling?
Do you operate a sales channel that no third party can switch off?

options.label: Yes, but it produces almost no revenue
Yes, and it is my primary channel

questions.text: Can you contact your buyers directly, using contact data you store yourself?

options.label: No — the platform mediates all contact
Only a small fraction of buyers

questions.text: If you left your main platform tomorrow, what share of your customers could follow you?
Who owns the customer and transaction data your sales generate?

options.label: The platform — I see only what it shows me
Shared, but the platform holds the master record
I hold my own copy of most of it

questions.text: Are your reviews and ratings portable to another venue?

options.label: No — they live and die inside one platform
I can display them elsewhere but not verify them
Partially portable through an independent service
Yes — independently verifiable outside any platform

questions.text: Does verifiable proof of your trading history exist outside any single platform's database?
How many independent payment or settlement rails can you accept today?

options.label: Two or three genuinely usable rails
Three or more, including cross-border options

questions.text: If your primary payment provider froze your payouts, what would happen?

options.label: I switch rails with minimal disruption

questions.text: Can you settle a cross-border sale without depending on one single intermediary?

options.label: I cannot settle cross-border at all
Through a small set of alternatives

questions.text: What share of your gross margin goes to intermediaries — commissions, ads, processing, fulfillment?

options.label: Roughly a third to a half
Roughly a fifth to a third

questions.text: Do you know your full route-to-buyer cost per sale?

options.label: No — I have never calculated it
Calculated, but not tracked over time

questions.text: Can a buyer in another country establish that you are trustworthy without a platform vouching for you?

options.label: No — my trust signals exist only inside platforms
Weakly — an independent site with no verifiable proof
Yes — strong independent, verifiable trust signals

questions.text: Can you operate across more than one trade or regulatory zone?

options.label: Yes, in a second zone with friction

questions.text: Is your catalog machine-readable — structured data or feeds an AI agent could parse?

options.label: No structured catalog data at all
Only inside a platform's proprietary system
Partially — some structured data on my own surface
Yes — fully structured and openly accessible

questions.text: Are your commercial terms — pricing, shipping, returns — published in a structured form an AI agent could parse?
Could an AI buying agent verify your identity and trust signals today, without asking a platform?

options.label: Only weak signals (domain age, basic site)

questions.text: Who can change the rules of your commerce without your consent?

options.label: Several parties, at any time, with no notice
Effectively no one — I set my own terms

questions.text: Do you have a documented exit path from each critical provider you depend on?

options.label: No — I have never mapped my dependencies
I know my dependencies but have no exit plans
Exit paths exist for some critical providers
Documented, tested exit paths for all of them
